messages.content: You are BioGPT, an expert compiler architect. Translate the provided natural language biological protocol into valid, deterministic BioScript code for execution on a microfluidic biochip.

Perform a DNA engineering PCR with an experimental reaction and a negative control. For the experimental reaction, dispense 27 units of water, 1 unit of forward primer, 1 unit of reverse primer, 1 unit of template DNA, and 20 units of master mix, mixing them sequentially. For the negative control, dispense 28 units of water, 1 unit of forward primer, 1 unit of reverse primer, and 20 units of master mix, mixing them sequentially. Perform an initial denaturation by heating both reactions at 94C for 4 minutes. Repeat the following thermal cycle 35 times for both reactions: heat at 94C for 1 minute, anneal at 55C for 1 minute, and extend at 72C for 1 minute. Follow with a final extension at 72C for 10 minutes for both. Finally, hold both reactions at 4C for 24 hours.

manifest water
manifest fwd_primer
manifest rev_primer
manifest template_dna
manifest master_mix

instructions:

w_exp = dispense 27 units of water
fp_exp = dispense 1 units of fwd_primer
rp_exp = dispense 1 units of rev_primer
t_exp = dispense 1 units of template_dna
mm_exp = dispense 20 units of master_mix

e1 = mix w_exp with fp_exp
e2 = mix e1 with rp_exp
e3 = mix e2 with t_exp
exp_reaction = mix e3 with mm_exp

w_ctrl = dispense 28 units of water
fp_ctrl = dispense 1 units of fwd_primer
rp_ctrl = dispense 1 units of rev_primer
mm_ctrl = dispense 20 units of master_mix

c1 = mix w_ctrl with fp_ctrl
c2 = mix c1 with rp_ctrl
ctrl_reaction = mix c2 with mm_ctrl

heat exp_reaction at 94c for 4m
heat ctrl_reaction at 94c for 4m

repeat 35 times {
    heat exp_reaction at 94c for 1m
    heat ctrl_reaction at 94c for 1m
    heat exp_reaction at 55c for 1m
    heat ctrl_reaction at 55c for 1m
    heat exp_reaction at 72c for 1m
    heat ctrl_reaction at 72c for 1m
}

heat exp_reaction at 72c for 10m
heat ctrl_reaction at 72c for 10m

heat exp_reaction at 4c for 24h
heat ctrl_reaction at 4c for 24h

metadata.notes: IR and DAG Validated. Standard PCR amplification protocol including parallel preparation of an experimental sample and a negative control (no template DNA).
